Workspaces

Company hubs

Run each company, client or team in its own private space.

CSorro Ltd

How it works

WorkspaceCompany, client or team hub.
ProjectThe actual piece of work inside that hub.
PeopleInvite to the workspace or only to selected projects.

Showcase controls

All workspaces stay hidden until the owner chooses what to publish.
